scripts.dev: concurrently --names "backend,frontend" --prefix-colors "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm install --include=dev --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm install --include=dev --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: npm run migrate:prod --prefix backend && npm run seed:prod --prefix backend && npm run fix-pkte:prod --prefix backend && npm run start --prefix backend
